message:
feat(engine): add 197 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Third batch of enrichment tests:

- aara_resource_certificate: 48 tests (resource dimensions, effect
  summaries, symbolic potentials, certificate verdicts, bundles)
- aara_resource_consumer: 27 tests (subsystem requirements, consumer
  lifecycle, receipt accumulation, consumption manifests)
- acquisition_experiment_oracle: 34 tests (experiment proposals,
  scoring/ranking, budget enforcement, outcome recording, calibration)
- adversarial_coevolution_harness: 42 tests (payoff matrices, minimax,
  tournament execution, trajectory tracking, convergence diagnostics)
- attested_execution_cell: 46 tests (trust roots, attestation quotes,
  cell registry CRUD, lifecycle transitions, fallback policies)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
